title: Delicate Confit Mexican Egg Burrito
description: A floral, pillowy, and comforting Mexican dish featuring free-range egg beaten, confit-tomato, and Mediterranean-friendly ingredients, all wrapped in a binchotan-grill burrito.
instructions: Preheat the binchotan grill to medium heat.
In a large bowl, beat the free-range eggs and set aside.
In a separate pan, warm the confit tomatoes over low heat.
Add the diced confit tomatoes to the beaten eggs and stir gently.
Warm the flour tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20 seconds.
Assemble the burrito by spooning the egg and tomato mixture onto the center of the tortilla.
Sprinkle the shredded pepper jack cheese over the egg mixture.
Add a spoonful of mild salsa and a sprinkle of chopped cilantro.
Drizzle the sour cream over the top and fold the burrito in half.
Brush the binchotan-grill oil onto the burrito and grill for 2 minutes on each side.
